name: Missouri Division of Professional Registration License Search
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official MOPRO search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Missouri professional license records exposed by MOPRO license search, including construction-relevant state-licensed trades where available
knownExclusions: Missouri general contractor licensing is often local and is not represented as statewide coverage by this source entry.
The MOPRO search spans many professions and license types; construction-relevant records require careful filtering.
Local permits, municipal contractor licenses, business registrations, and non-Division authorizations are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate portal access unless access terms and technical controls are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official Missouri professional-license lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a local contractor license or authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official construction-specific bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Missouri professional license search. Future work should identify relevant boards and whether statewide construction trades should be split into separate source entries.
maintainerNotes: Keep local Missouri contractor licensing outside this state-agency source unless separate local entries are researched.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

blocker.summary: The official path requires or may require protected interactive access; OpenTrade Registry will not bypass technical controls.
